prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 44.4 kg; Height 153.7 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 185mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 43.8kg; 9 months ago 45.1kg; 6 months ago 44.2kg; 3 months ago 44.8kg; current 44.4kg), Height (12 months ago 153.7cm; 9 months ago 153.7cm; 6 months ago 153.7cm; 3 months ago 153.7cm; current 153.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.6mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.6mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1116mg/g; 9 months ago 861mg/g; 6 months ago 1138mg/g; 3 months ago 1166mg/g; current 903mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 120mg/dL; 9 months ago 123mg/dL; 6 months ago 125mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 9.4g/dL; 3 months ago 9.9g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.98 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
